meanings.usage: 表示人感到累或困倦的状态
指为买某物而长期积攒钱财
表示对自己或他人的成就感到满意
指床等家具中的金属弹簧结构
指风等将某物吹走或移动
指物体猛烈撞击或坠落
指建筑物围成的露天场地
修饰动词，表示发生的事令人惊奇
表示紧接着某事之后立刻发生

examples.en: Tired of sleeping on the floor, he decided to buy a bed.
examples.zh: 由于厌倦了睡在地板上，他决定买一张床。

examples.en: He saved up for years to buy a real bed.
examples.zh: 他积蓄了多年才买到一张真正的床。

examples.en: For the first time in his life, he became the proud owner of a bed.
examples.zh: 他生平第一次成为一张床的骄傲主人。

examples.en: On the third night, a storm blew up.
examples.zh: 第三天晚上，刮起了风暴。

examples.en: A gust of wind swept the bed off the roof.
examples.zh: 一阵风把床从屋顶上刮走了。

examples.en: The bed crashed into the courtyard below.
examples.zh: 床砰的一声落到了下面的院子里。

examples.en: Although the bed was smashed to pieces, the man was unhurt.
examples.zh: 虽然床摔成了碎片，但人却安然无恙。

examples.en: The young man did not wake up until the bed had struck the ground.
examples.zh: 直到床撞到地面，他才醒来。

examples.en: The man sadly picked up the mattress.
He promptly went to sleep again.

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作，常与'by the time'、'before'、'until'等连用
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时

examples.en: He did not wake up until the bed had struck the ground.
examples.zh: 直到床撞到地面，他才醒来。

examples.en: After he had put it on the floor, he promptly went to sleep again.
examples.zh: 他把床垫放在地板上之后，立刻又睡着了。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述故事发生的背景，或与一般过去时连用表示'正在...时突然...'

examples.en: On the third night, a storm blew up.
examples.zh: 第三天晚上，刮起了风暴。

grammar.title: 让步状语从句 (Although/Though Clause)
grammar.definition: 用although或though引导的状语从句，表示'虽然...但是...'
grammar.structure: Although/Though + 主语 + 谓语, 主句
grammar.usage: 用来引出与主句意思相反或相对比的情况

examples.en: Although the bed was smashed to pieces, the man was miraculously unhurt.
examples.zh: 虽然床摔成了碎片，但那人却奇迹般地没有受伤。

original.en: The young man did not wake up until the bed had struck the ground.
original.zh: 直到床撞到地面，他才醒来。

imitations.en: I did not realize my mistake until the teacher pointed it out.
imitations.zh: 直到老师指出我的错误，我才意识到。

imitations.en: He did not go to bed until he finished his homework.
imitations.zh: 他直到写完作业才上床睡觉。

original.en: Although the bed was smashed to pieces, the man was miraculously unhurt.
original.zh: 虽然床摔成了碎片，但那人却奇迹般地没有受伤。

imitations.en: Although it was raining heavily, we still went out.
imitations.zh: 虽然雨下得很大，我们仍然出去了。

imitations.en: Although she was very tired, she kept working.
imitations.zh: 虽然她很累了，但她继续工作。

sentencePatterns.pattern: After + 过去完成时 + 主句

original.en: After he had put it on the floor, he promptly went to sleep again.
original.zh: 他把床垫放在地板上之后，立刻又睡着了。

imitations.en: After she had finished dinner, she watched TV.
imitations.zh: 她吃完晚饭后看了会儿电视。

imitations.en: After I had cleaned the room, I took a shower.
imitations.zh: 我打扫完房间后洗了个澡。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be tired of doing something

original.en: Tired of sleeping on the floor, a young man saved up for years to buy a real bed.
original.zh: 由于厌倦了睡在地板上，一个年轻人积蓄多年买了一张真正的床。

imitations.en: Tired of waiting in line, he decided to leave.
imitations.zh: 厌倦了排队等候，他决定离开。

imitations.en: Tired of the city life, they moved to the countryside.
imitations.zh: 厌倦了城市生活，他们搬到了乡下。
